name: Weekly Adzuna India Jobs Digest - Resume PDF Rerank

parameters.query:
SELECT *
FROM jobs
WHERE source = 'adzuna'
  AND COALESCE(emailed, false) = false
  AND date_posted >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND (
      LOWER(title) LIKE '%engineer%'
   OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%developer%'
   OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%software%'
   OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%machine learning%'
   OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%ai%'
   OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%artificial intelligence%'
   OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%data scientist%'
   OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%data engineer%'
   OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%python%'
   OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%backend%'
   OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%full stack%'
   OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%frontend%'
   OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%devops%'
   OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%ml%'
   OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%deep learning%'
  )
ORDER BY date_posted DESC NULLS LAST,
         created_at DESC
LIMIT 50;

messageValues.message: You are an expert ATS recruiter.  Compare one candidate resume against one job posting.  Evaluate how well the candidate matches the role.  Never invent information.  Return ONLY valid JSON matching the output schema.

parameters.query:
UPDATE jobs
SET
    compatibility_score = {{ Number($json.compatibility_score) }},
    rerank_reasoning = {{ "'" + String($json.reasoning).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
    matching_skills = {{ "'" + JSON.stringify($json.matching_skills || []).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::jsonb" }},
    missing_skills = {{ "'" + JSON.stringify($json.missing_skills || []).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::jsonb" }},
    scored_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ "'" + $json.job_id + "'::uuid" }}
RETURNING *;

messageValues.message: You are an expert ATS resume parser.  Your task is to accurately extract structured information from resumes.  Rules: - Return only information explicitly present in the resume. - Never hallucinate or invent information. - If a field is missing, return an empty array. - Preserve the original wording where possible. - For projects, extract the project title and the technologies/frameworks/tools mentioned. - Ignore contact details except the candidate's name.

parameters.query:
SELECT *
FROM jobs
WHERE source = 'adzuna'
  AND COALESCE(emailed, false) = false
  AND compatibility_score IS NOT NULL
  AND date_posted >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
ORDER BY compatibility_score DESC,
         date_posted DESC NULLS LAST,
         created_at DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT
    digest_email,
    city,
    job_type,
    search_terms,
    pdf_url,
    max_jobs_to_rerank,
    updated_at
FROM workflow_config
WHERE id = 1
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO workflow_config (
    id,
    digest_email,
    city,
    job_type,
    search_terms,
    pdf_url,
    max_jobs_to_rerank,
    updated_at
)
VALUES (
    1,
    {{ "'" + $json.digest_email.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
    {{ $json.city ? "'" + $json.city.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.job_type ? "'" + $json.job_type.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.search_terms ? "'" + $json.search_terms.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ "'" + $json.pdfUrl.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
    {{ Number($json.max_jobs_to_rerank || 50) }},
    NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (id)
DO UPDATE SET
    digest_email = EXCLUDED.digest_email,
    city = EXCLUDED.city,
    job_type = EXCLUDED.job_type,
    search_terms = EXCLUDED.search_terms,
    pdf_url = EXCLUDED.pdf_url,
    max_jobs_to_rerank = EXCLUDED.max_jobs_to_rerank,
    updated_at = NOW();

assignments.name: html
assignments.value:
={{ `

Job digest workflow failed

Workflow: ${$json.workflow?.name || 'unknown'}

Error: ${$json.execution?.error?.message || $json.error?.message || 'Unknown error'}

Open the failed n8n execution for details.

` }}
